【﻿Ｓｔｏｒｙ　Ｉｎｆｏ：】

You have just stopped to pick up a man hitchhiking on the side of the road.

However, when you agree to give him a ride, the first thing you notice after he opens your passenger door is the blood on his jeans.

The second thing you notice is the second man now opening your driver door and pulling you out of the vehicle.

You should have never stopped.

Now, you're next.
